title: calliandra humilis var. gentryana
intro: Calliandra humilis var. gentryana, also known as Gentry's Powderpuff, is a flowering plant species in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Calliandra humilis var. gentryana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cough and cold symptoms, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
